programme.desc: The detectives go undercover to arrest a man who brutally attacks other men; a deceptively tough defense attorney (Nia Vardalos) complicates ADA Barba's case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a janitor violently attacks a coach, the SVU team connects the janitor's behavior to a history of sexual abuse; the detectives find more victims of the same predator -- including a prisoner (Mike Tyson) on death row.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU squad tries to keep Detective Rollins' sister safe from her abusive boyfriend when she turns up beaten and pregnant; when Rollins is forced to take drastic action, internal affairs investigation begins.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A promising singer is beaten by her boyfriend, a famous hip-hop star, but she refuses to help ADA Barba build his case; the defendant and his attorney turn the case into a media circus.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman claims that Brian Cassidy (Dean Winters) raped her while he was working undercover; when Cassidy and his lawyer utilize surprising defense methods, Detective Amaro is affected.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A popular sports reporter (Lauren Cohan) accuses a cameraman (David Marciano) of rape and stalking; when the victim learns she is pregnant as a result of the rape, the defense employs controversial tactics in hope of gaining favor with the jury.

programme.desc: Donna's mother returns to console her daughter; Kitty finds Hyde's birth certificate and makes a discovery about his father; Eric tries to explain his actions to Donna.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Eric makes plans to sell Donna's engagement ring to fund taking a year off, but when he learns Donna threw it from the water tower the gang goes searching for it, with disastrous results.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Don persuades Adam to turn his cluttered garage into a man cave; Adam is distraught after thinking he gave away one of Andi's beloved keepsakes.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Andi struggles to stay on the sideline while Adam, David and Lowell organize the school's Thanksgiving dinner.

programme.title: Grounded for Life
programme.desc: Sean (Donal Logue) tries to keep Eddie (Kevin Corrigan) from hitting on a woman (guest star Julie Claire) Claudia (Megyn Price) is consoling after a break-up.

programme.title: Grounded for Life
programme.desc: Sean (Donal Logue) and the boys are chased by angry sports fans after he causes the Yankees to lose a game.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Young Love, Old Love and Take This Job and Shove It
programme.desc: Darlene worries about Mark making friends at his new school; Mark turns to Ben for personal advice; Becky finds herself thriving in college and starts thinking about her future plans.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Let's All Push Our Hands Together for the Stew Train and the Conners Furniture
programme.desc: When Jackie devises an offbeat plan of how to serve the customers at the diner, it's anything but smooth service; Dan begins to sell some furniture to make room for his new bride and her things.

programme.title: Just for Laughs Gags
programme.desc: "Knock-Out Grandma"; "To Serve, Protect and Dance"; "A Really Scary Scarecrow."

programme.title: Just for Laughs Gags
programme.desc: "Mock of Seagulls"; "Brownie Buster"; "The Postman Only Pranks Twice."

programme.title: Protect Your Family From Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every 5 seconds there's a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert you, restore your identity, and reimburse lost funds—leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: NECTAR TRI-PILLOW -Cooler, Comfy, Better Sleep! Buy One Get One FREE!
programme.desc: Discover the Nectar Tri-Comfort Cooling Pillow for the ultimate sleep experience! Adjustable to three firmness levels to provide customized support and cooling all night long. Order NOW to get a second pillow FREE, plus a 30-night home trial!

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: 2026 Silver Eagle is here & it is a once-in-a-lifetime coin!
programme.desc: Join your hosts Kevin Cash & Cory Cady as we discuss the 250th Anniversary of America with the official "America 250" logo on a Silver American Eagle label; we are locking in orders for this iconic release, but coins are limited! Don't miss out!

programme.title: Rateescape: Stop Overpaying for Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: World's Funniest Videos: Top 10 Countdown
programme.desc: Covers different themes in the search for the best and funniest videos from around the world; includes an entertaining look at relatable moments from real-life home movies.

programme.title: World's Funniest Videos: Top 10 Countdown
programme.desc: The family we were born into can be our closest confidants, our partners in crime, and the people who know us best.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Eric (Topher Grace) has a tough boss (guest star Danny Bonaduce) at the town's first fast-food burger joint; Donna's (Laura Prepon) party gets out of control. With Mila Kunis, Ashton Kutcher and Danny Masterson.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Eric and Donna (Topher Grace, Laura Prepon) find a full keg of beer in the middle of the road and decide to throw a party. With Danny Masterson and Ashton Kutcher. Eve Plumb guest stars as Mrs. Burkhart.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: The Taylors' lives come to a halt when Jill (Patricia Richardson) is told she might need a hysterectomy. With Tim Allen.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Jill's mother visits to help Jill and Tim cope with the emotional highs and lows following Jill's surgery.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Wilson (Earl Hindman) wins a large sum of money and decides to build a greenhouse which annoys Tim (Tim Allen).

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim decides to buy the hardware store from Harry, but wonders what he is doing wrong when it stops making money.

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: When Abishola's ex-husband, Tayo, visits Detroit for work, everyone falls under his spell except Bob and Abishola, who know there must be more to his visit than he claims.

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: Abishola gets the surprise of a lifetime when she finds out Bob has flown in Dele and her mother, Ebun, from Nigeria; the joy is cut short when Ebun's constant criticism makes Bob question his success as a businessman.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: After finding out about the surprise party Jim was planning for her, Cheryl tries to throw a surprise party for him, but he's too busy to show up because he's bowling with Chicago Bears football star Brian Urlacher.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl hides the digital camera after Jim deliberately deletes a photograph she urged him to save.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: When Kyle and Mandy individually reveal a secret to Mike and Vanessa, respectively, they are sworn not to tell the other; Ryan invites Mike to be a guest on his podcast.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Eve returns home for a weekend visit, and Vanessa tries to re-create a childhood tradition for the girls; Jen asks Ed and Chuck for help in finding out who is stealing her work lunches; Kristin's big day finally arrives.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: A series of time jumps finds Mike and Vanessa with two new grandchildren as well as Mandy and Kyle living with them; Vanessa and Mandy clash over Vanessa's "helpfulness"; Chuck desperately hopes it's last call on Ed's mixology happy hour.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Vanessa hires a home improvement repairman who bears an uncanny resemblance to Mike; Kyle and Ryan defend their favorite comic book writer to Mandy and Kristen; Mike struggles with an idea for his video blog.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Don become super protective of Lowell when they think he might get back together with his cheating ex-wife; Joe experiences an unexpected side effect from his new pacemaker.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi offer Teddy dating advice but wind up making things super awkward for him instead.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim turns baby-sitting into a sporting event by staging baby races where the fathers bet on their kids.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Despite Mandy's warnings, Andy plays snow football with Jim and gets injured.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim tries to be a cool dad to impress Ruby and her friends but realizes that she is just manipulating him.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: When Jim is prescribed pain pills for a back injury, the family takes advantage of his unusually mellow mood.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Jill (Patricia Richardson) is asked out on a date and realizes her 18-year marriage has lost some spark and romance. With Tim Allen.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Randy (Jonathan Taylor Thomas) questions God's existence, which prompts Tim (Tim Allen) to visit the Rev. Mike (guest star Dan Aykroyd).

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: The Taylors celebrate Thanksgiving with a Hollywood producer at a Detroit Lions football game. Guest stars: Rodney Dangerfield, Alex Rocco and Tom Poston.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim (Tim Allen) starts hanging out with his students when he gets a teaching job at the local college. With Patricia Richardson.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike is upset when he feels like security cameras in the neighborhood are impacting his family's privacy -- until he sees compromising footage of Mandy.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike sees how important it is for Ryan and Kyle to have a father figure in their lives when he encourages them to stand up for their beliefs.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike uses his vlog to track down a homeless man who has gone missing; Mandy helps a young mother from the woman's shelter.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike and Vanessa come home early from their anniversary celebration and find Mandy was planning a party -- complete with beer and underage guests; Kristen feels nervous about her upcoming wedding.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Hyde gets a big surprise when he meets his real father; Eric and Donna attend a feminist rally; Kelso prepares for the arrival of his baby.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Eric tries his hand at vandalism; Red buys a local muffler shop; Kelso's daughter gives him a newfound respect for women.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: After Red offers him a job, Hyde must choose between working with Red or his real father; Fez gets a job as a shampoo boy at the local beauty shop.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: With an empty nest, Kitty decides on a course of self-improvement; Eric decides he wants to be an artist; Hyde learns the joys of business attire.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: When none of the kids will confess to putting a hole in the wall, Adam and Andi team up to find the guilty one.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam tries to guide his eldest daughter through a momentous occasion when Andi is unavailable; Andi gets stuck in traffic while trying to take Emme and Teddy to the zoo.

programme.title: Gaither Gospel Hour
programme.desc: "There Is Hope" finds singer, songwriter and GMA Hall of Fame Member Mark Lowry sharing messages of God's love and grace as he reflects on the promises of a Father who loves His children.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you in agreement with God regarding your future? Joyce explains why it's time to leave the past behind and agree with what God's Word says about your future.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Explanation that Jesus is mediator for God's people.

programme.title: Praise
programme.desc: Sheila Walsh hosts Dr. Henry Cloud, Dr. Sharon May and Dr. Harold Duncan for a conversation on The Church and Mental Health.

programme.title: Worship With The Binions and Friends
programme.sub-title: Maranda Curtis, Jonathan McReynolds and Todd Dulanev Part 1
programme.desc: David and Nicole Binion host dynamic nights of worship with live music from top gospel artists.

programme.title: Jesus: The Game Changer
programme.desc: Karl Faase travels to the U.K., U.S., Singapore, India and Australia, interviewing authors, academics and modern-day game changers about how the life and teaching of Jesus changed the world and why it matters.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.desc: Host Cody Crouch takes us on an unforgettable ride through the moments that made the U.S.A. the country it is today.

programme.title: My First Trip to Israel
programme.desc: Sheila Walsh is in Israel to show the Jesus of the Bible and see where He walked and ministered.

programme.title: 2nd Chance: Revival In America's Prisons
programme.desc: Bringing hope to the hopeless within the prisons of America - that is the mission of TBN 2nd Chance. Changing the hearts and minds of those so often seen as cold-blooded and worthless.

programme.title: Hagee Ministries
programme.desc: The mission of John Hagee Ministries is to take the Gospel to all the world and to all generations.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Dr. David Jeremiah shares the practical messages behind Christianity and helps people to discover their own turning points in their relationship with God.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: God wants to build us up through His Word, especially during times of emotional distress. Today, learn to take control of your emotions and make every day better.

programme.title: Steven Furtick
programme.desc: From Elevation Church in Charlotte, N.C., Pastor Steven Furtick offers inspirational messages through his sermons.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.sub-title: How to Win in Life Through the Holy Spirit
programme.desc: Discover God's plan for you to prosper and bless others, even in tough times.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.sub-title: Develop a Victor, Not a Victom, Mindset
programme.desc: The teaching ministry of American Southern Baptist pastor and television host, Robert Jeffress; he is a senior minister of the First Baptist Church in Dallas as well as a Fox News contributor.

programme.title: Life Today With James Robison
programme.desc: Max Lucado, the pastor and author of "Tame Your Thoughts," shows you how to change your life by learning to manage your thoughts.

programme.title: The Supernatural Now
programme.desc: Apostle Guillermo Maldonado is the Sr. Pastor and founder of King Jesus International Ministry (Ministerio Internacional El Rey Jesus), considered one of the fastest growing multicultural churches in the United States.

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.sub-title: Are Your Steps Directed by God?
programme.desc: Dru Hammer joins Rick and uses her family's story to demonstrate God's hand at work in the lives of amazing people -- even when they are unaware.

programme.title: Ron Carpenter
programme.desc: Ron Carpenter leads the Body of Christ to a new level and reaches out to the lost and hurting.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack: Gospel Truth
programme.desc: Andrew shares various truths from God's Word about healing, while highlighting amazing healing testimonies.

programme.title: Better Together
programme.desc: Laurie Crouch, Sheila Walsh, Kristi McLelland, Yael Eckstein and Miranda Torrence share how the Psalms invite honest responses, deepen trust, offer comfort in times of pain and stir praise in every season.

programme.title: Lawson Perdue, Grace for Today
programme.desc: Pastor Lawson Perdue from the Charis Christian Center outreach speaks to viewers across the globe about the practical message of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Faith Is the Victory
programme.desc: Mark and Trina Hankins share messages about faith, helping believers understand their identity in Christ and the Holy Spirit's role in their lives.

programme.title: Allen Jackson Ministries
programme.desc: What's the best way to prepare for the uncertain future? Trust God with our resources! Pastor Allen Jackson talks about biblical principles surrounding the money, resources, and possessions.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Dr. David Jeremiah shares the practical messages behind Christianity and helps people to discover their own turning points in their relationship with God.

programme.title: Joseph Prince

programme.desc: Discover God's plan for you to prosper and bless others, even in tough times.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics

programme.title: Better Together

programme.title: Christine Caine
programme.desc: Studying the story of the woman who washed Jesus' feet.

programme.desc: The power of the gospel changes lives in Australia as Franklin Graham shares his story of moving from fear to faith.
